title: Landscape Fabric Guides and Install Videos
author: DOTDAY

seo.metaDescription: Field-tested landscape fabric guides and professional install videos for SHIELD, XBAR and TERRA. Use the right fabric for the right ground condition.

ogImage.alt: DOTDAY landscape fabric professional installation under gravel

sections.heading: Guides and install videos
sections.subheading: Everything you need to choose and install the right landscape fabric, from the people who make it.

cards.title: Landscape Fabric Thickness Chart: oz Weights by Job
cards.excerpt: Fabric is sold by weight in ounces per square yard, and that number is the whole decision. This chart matches each oz weight to the job it is built for.

image.alt: DOTDAY SHIELD woven fabric in garden beds, oz weights by job

cards.author: DOTDAY Field Team

cards.title: Woven vs Non Woven Landscape Fabric: How to Choose
cards.excerpt: They look similar on the roll and get used interchangeably, but woven and non-woven are built for completely different ground conditions.

image.alt: DOTDAY TERRA geotextile for drainage and separation

cards.author: DOTDAY Field Team

cards.title: Weed Barrier Under Pavers: What Actually Holds Up
cards.excerpt: A light garden cloth under a paver base pumps and tears. Here is what the fabric is really doing, and the weight that holds up under load.

image.alt: DOTDAY XBAR weed barrier under gravel and pavers

cards.author: Marcus Halvorsen

sections.heading: Not sure which fabric fits your ground?
sections.body: Answer a few questions and we will match SHIELD, XBAR, or TERRA to your job.

links.label: XBAR 5oz dual-layer for gravel and hardscape
